description_long: This is a large, heavily armored military tank with a long-barreled main cannon mounted on a rotating turret. The vehicle features a low, wide profile with sloped armor plating covering the entire body, enhancing its defensive capabilities. The exterior is painted in a mottled camouflage pattern of green, brown, and black, designed to break up its outline. Visible details include multiple hatches on the turret, side-mounted spare track links, and a pair of radio antennas. The tank runs on continuous metal tracks with prominent road wheels, providing mobility over rough terrain. Military insignia and markings are visible on the turret, adding to its authentic appearance.
description: A large, camouflaged military tank with a long cannon, sloped armor, and continuous metal tracks. The vehicle is detailed with hatches, antennas, and military markings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the long cannon, sloped frontal armor, and the tank's wide, imposing stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the length of the cannon, the turret's details, side-mounted spare tracks, and the full track system.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the engine exhausts, rear armor, and the back of the turret with visible hatches.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cannon, turret, and track system, with additional details of the camouflage pattern.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the turret; no other visible weapon mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating; reinforced turret and hull with visible modular panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Woodland camouflage with irregular patches of green, brown, and black in a blended, organic style.
attribute_military_markings: White cross insignia on the turret sides; no other visible numbers or symbols.
